content.text: I have both files. Assessing at-risk tasks against the sprint end date (2026-07-18) and writing the assessment.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint window: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment based on: sprint_14_task_assignments.txt + helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt
(Testing log coverage through 2026-07-11)

TASKS AT RISK OF MISSING THE SPRINT DEADLINE
============================================

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked
   Risk level: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Explicitly Blocked pending Meridian sample data (expected 2026-07-15).
   - Open defect HEL-D-014 (HIGH): MM/DD/YYYY date normalization fails; affects ~40% of Meridian source data.
   - Sample data arrives on the task due date, leaving little or no buffer to implement and retest before sprint end.
   - Same owner also carries HEL-D-015 (memory overflow on large ingestion), increasing capacity pressure.

2. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk
   Risk level: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Already flagged "At Risk" in the assignment board.
   - 8-point infrastructure task with due date only two days before sprint close; slip would leave no time for dependent UAT.

3. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Points: 3 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started
   Risk level: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Not started as of mid-sprint.
   - Due on the final day of the sprint (no schedule buffer).
   - Depends on dashboard work (HEL-241/HEL-242); related test TC-604 (load time benchmark, 100k records) has not been run.
   - Chart suite still incomplete (TC-602 in progress, TC-603 not run), so benchmark environment may not be ready in time.

4. HEL-245 — Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress
   Risk level: MEDIUM–HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Pipeline suite is only 5/7 passing; two HIGH open defects block green status:
     • HEL-D-014 (date normalization MM/DD/YYYY)
     • HEL-D-015 (large-file memory overflow ~210k records)
   - Both defects owned by Amir Hassan, who is already blocked on HEL-243.
   - Task due on sprint end date; closure depends on external defect fixes that are themselves at risk.

5. HEL-242 — Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress
   Risk level: MEDIUM
   Reasons:
   - Large (8-point) feature still in progress mid-sprint.
   - QA: TC-602 (line chart) in progress; TC-603 (bar chart) not run.
   - Slip past 7/16 would compress time for HEL-247 performance benchmarking before 7/18.

OTHER NOTES (lower immediate sprint-end risk)
- HEL-241 (data table): In Progress, due 7/14; TC-601 already PASS — less concerning for sprint end if closed near due date.
- HEL-244 (auth flows): Done; suite 4/4 PASS.
- HEL-248 (GeoSync license): In Progress, due 7/14, 2 points — monitor but not a primary technical delivery risk for Helios core.

SUMMARY
-------
Highest risk of missing the 2026-07-18 sprint deadline:
  HEL-243 (Blocked + open HIGH defect + shared owner load)
  HEL-246 (explicitly At Risk, large infra task)
  HEL-247 (Not Started, last-day due, dashboard dependency)
  HEL-245 (blocked by open pipeline defects HEL-D-014 / HEL-D-015)
  HEL-242 (large remaining chart work; QA incomplete)

Recommended focus: unblock Meridian sample data / HEL-243 and HEL-D-014, escalate HEL-246 provisioning, and start HEL-247 planning against dashboard readiness so the sprint can still close on 2026-07-18.

content.text:
Assessment written to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`.

**Tasks at risk of missing the 2026-07-18 sprint deadline:**

| Task | Risk | Why |
|------|------|-----|
| **HEL-243** (date format normalization) | High | Blocked on Meridian sample data (due same day as task); open HIGH defect HEL-D-014 |
| **HEL-246** (UAT server provisioning) | High | Already marked At Risk; 8 pts due 7/16 |
| **HEL-247** (dashboard load benchmark) | High | Not started; due last day of sprint; depends on dashboard work |
| **HEL-245** (data pipeline integration tests) | Med–High | 2 open HIGH defects (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015) blocking a green suite |
| **HEL-242** (chart rendering) | Medium | Large 8-pt task still in progress; QA chart cases incomplete |

Auth suite (HEL-244) is done and green; data table (HEL-241) looks healthier with TC-601 already passing.
